name: Sample trace
description: A minimal sample trace for local development.

steps.title: Enter openTrace
steps.summary: Enter openTrace() and begin loading the selected trace file.

steps.title: Call parseTraceFile
steps.summary: openTrace() calls parseTraceFile(traceUri) before it can update the UI.

steps.title: Enter parseTraceFile
steps.summary: Enter parseTraceFile() and read, parse, and validate the JSON trace document.

steps.title: Return from parseTraceFile
steps.summary: parseTraceFile() finishes and returns the parsed trace document to its caller.

steps.title: Resume at the same parseTraceFile call site
steps.summary: After parseTraceFile() returns, the flow comes back to the same await parseTraceFile(traceUri) line in openTrace().

steps.title: Call updateUi
steps.summary: openTrace() calls updateUi() after the parsed trace has been stored.

steps.title: Enter updateUi
steps.summary: Enter updateUi() and refresh the editor highlight and panel state for the current step.

steps.title: Return from updateUi
steps.summary: updateUi() finishes and returns control to openTrace().

steps.title: Resume at the same updateUi call site
steps.summary: After updateUi() returns, the flow comes back to the same await updateUi() line in openTrace() before moving below it.
